cards.title: Rule and Purpose
cards.governance_note: Document the heuristic rule, objective, proxy, parameters, and intended use.

cards.title: Validation and Robustness
cards.governance_note: Benchmark against baselines, exact small cases, stress cases, multi-seed runs, and parameter sensitivity.

cards.title: Monitoring and Accountability
cards.governance_note: Preserve logs, scores, seeds, versions, subgroup performance, drift alerts, and review cadence.
